Records.authors: Marzucca, Robin, McLeod, Andrew J., Nega, Christoph
Records.description: Two-loop integral family for mixed QCD-EW corrections to $gg \to H$ at $\mathcal{O}(g^3 g_s^2)$. This family has one massless loop ($k_1$ loop) and one massive loop ($k_2$ loop with $m_t$), connected by a massive $M$ line. Depends on two dimensionless variables $s/m_t^2$ and $M^2/m_t^2$. Contains 15 master integrals computed through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$ (weight 6). Does not contain the sunrise elliptic subtopology, so all integrals evaluate to multiple polylogarithms. The momentum-space symbol alphabet has 12 letters (eq. 3.14). Rationalization uses $x$ and $z$ variables. Master integrals are pure and uniformly transcendental. Family 3 has a massless threshold at $s=0$, so boundary conditions require the method of regions.
ancillaryPaths: ancillary files on arXiv and Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.14843619)
